title: Musopen (Free)
query: mediatype:audio AND collection:musopen AND -subject:"spoken word" AND -mediatype:audiobook AND -subject:audiobook AND -subject:"sound effects" AND -subject:"sound effect" AND -subject:"test tones" AND -subject:"non-music"
notes: Musopen public-domain and Creative Commons classical recordings. Non-free licenses filtered at scrape time via licenseurl field; only pd, cc0, cc-by, cc-by-sa are indexed.

title: Netlabels (Free)
query: mediatype:audio AND collection:netlabels AND -subject:"spoken word" AND -mediatype:audiobook AND -subject:audiobook AND -subject:"sound effects" AND -subject:"sound effect" AND -subject:sfx AND -subject:"test tones" AND -subject:"test tone" AND -subject:"non-music"
notes: Internet Archive netlabel releases. Non-free licenses filtered at scrape time via licenseurl field; only pd, cc0, cc-by, cc-by-sa are indexed.
